seo.title: CreativeBro | Jasa Pembuatan Website & Aplikasi Mobile Premium
seo.description: CreativeBro adalah studio kreatif yang fokus membangun website (React, Laravel) dan aplikasi mobile (Flutter) yang cepat, responsif, dan siap meroketkan bisnis lu.
seo.keywords: jasa pembuatan website, bikin aplikasi android, flutter jakarta, react developer indonesia, creativebro, web portofolio, laravel developer

hero.subheadline: CreativeBro adalah tempat di mana baris kode React, Laravel, dan Flutter disulap menjadi produk digital yang mahal, responsif, dan siap meroketkan bisnis lu.

services.title: APA YANG BISA KAMI BANTU?
services.web_desc: Bikin landing page, web portofolio, sampai sistem custom yang cepat dan SEO-friendly pake React, Tailwind, dan Laravel.
services.mobile_title: JASA BUAT APLIKASI FLUTTER ANDROID & IOS
services.mobile_desc: Pengembangan aplikasi Android dan iOS yang smooth, native-look, dan siap rilis ke Play Store pake Flutter.
services.backend_desc: Arsitektur database yang solid, aman, dan integrasi API yang seamless menggunakan MySQL, Firebase, atau Supabase.
services.video_desc: Bikin konten TikTok/Reels lu FYP dan video company profile bisnis lu kelihatan sinematik, interaktif, & profesional.
services.design_desc: Mulai dari desain feed Instagram bulanan, logo brand, sampai pitch deck buat kebutuhan presentasi ke investor.
services.production_desc: Pengambilan aset visual langsung di lapangan. Mulai dari foto produk komersial, dokumentasi event, hingga produksi video profile perusahaan dengan gear standar industri.

portfolio.title: KUMPULAN PROYEK KAMI
portfolio.subtitle: Kumpulan proyek sukses yang kami bangun dengan dedikasi penuh.

projects.title: MAINTPRO CMMS
projects.desc: Computerized Maintenance Management System untuk manajemen aset dan monitoring maintainer industri.
projects.problem: Pencatatan maintenance masih manual menggunakan kertas sehingga laporan sering hilang dan respon lambat.
projects.solution: Membangun aplikasi Android berbasis Flutter dan database MySQL untuk pelaporan kerusakan mesin secara real-time langsung dari lapangan.

projects.title: TRO MET INDONESIA
projects.desc: Web landing page premium untuk produk trolley medis dengan desain interaktif, performa optimal, dan dukungan multi-bahasa.
projects.problem: Tromindo (Tromet Indonesia) membutuhkan platform web landing page profesional untuk memasarkan produk trolley medis berkualitas tinggi ke pasar global.
projects.solution: CreativeBro merancang dan membangun platform web landing page premium menggunakan React dan Tailwind CSS dengan sistem translasi multi-bahasa yang dinamis (Inggris, Mandarin, Arab).
result: Tampilan visual katalog trolley medis tersaji secara eksklusif
Meningkatkan conversion rate leads B2B dari luar negeri
Web super cepat, responsif, dan ramah SEO

projects.title: COOPIN MOBILE AD VIDEO CAMPAIGN
projects.desc: Produksi video campaign komersial dan editing motion graphic untuk optimasi iklan mobile.
projects.problem: Kebutuhan visual iklan digital yang dituntut memiliki retention rate tinggi dan transisi yang dinamis agar konversi performa iklan meningkat.
projects.solution: Merancang editing video kreatif dengan ritme cepat, color grading modern, serta penambahan motion graphics interaktif untuk menarik audiens dalam 3 detik pertama.
result: Audience retention rate video mencapai target
Aset visual iklan siap pakai di berbagai platform mobile ads

whatsapp.cta: Ingin berkonsultasi untuk rencana pembuatan website Anda? Tekan tombol Call to Action di kiri bawah untuk terhubung dengan tim konsultan kami.

seo.title: CreativeBro | Premium Web & Mobile App Development Services
seo.description: CreativeBro is a creative studio focused on building fast, responsive, and high-converting websites (React, Laravel) and mobile apps (Flutter).
seo.keywords: web development services, mobile app development, flutter developer, react developer, creativebro portfolio, custom software development

hero.subheadline: CreativeBro is where lines of React, Laravel, and Flutter code are crafted into premium, responsive digital products ready to scale your business.

services.title: HOW CAN WE HELP YOU?
services.web_desc: Building high-speed, SEO-friendly custom websites and portfolios using React, Tailwind, and Laravel.
services.mobile_desc: Developing smooth, native-looking cross-platform applications ready for Play Store deployment using Flutter.
services.backend_desc: Solid, secure database architecture and seamless API integration using MySQL, Firebase, or Supabase.
services.video_desc: Crafting cinematic, interactive, and professional TikTok/Reels and company profile videos to boost engagement.
services.design_desc: From monthly Instagram feeds and brand logos to high-converting pitch decks for investor presentations.
services.production_desc: On-field visual asset production. Ranging from commercial product photography and event documentation to corporate video profiles using industry-standard gear.

portfolio.title: OUR SELECTED WORK
portfolio.subtitle: A collection of successful projects built with absolute dedication.

projects.title: MAINTPRO CMMS
projects.desc: Computerized Maintenance Management System for industrial asset management and maintainer monitoring.
projects.problem: Maintenance records were paper-based, causing lost reports and delayed responses.
projects.solution: Developed a Flutter Android app integrated with a MySQL database for real-time machine breakdown reporting directly from the field.

projects.title: TRO MET INDONESIA
projects.desc: Premium web landing page for medical trolley products with interactive design, optimal performance, and multi-language support.
projects.problem: Tromet Indonesia needed a professional web landing page platform to market high-quality medical trolley products to the global market.
projects.solution: CreativeBro designed and built a premium web landing page using React and Tailwind CSS with a dynamic multi-language translation system (English, Mandarin, Arabic).
result: Exclusive visual display of medical trolley catalog
Increased B2B leads conversion rate from global clients
Super fast, responsive, and SEO-friendly website

projects.title: COOPIN MOBILE AD VIDEO CAMPAIGN
projects.desc: Commercial video campaign production and motion graphic editing for mobile ad optimization.
projects.problem: The need for digital ad visuals that demand high retention rates and dynamic transitions to boost ad conversion performance.
projects.solution: Designed a fast-paced creative video edit with modern color grading and interactive motion graphics to hook audiences within the first 3 seconds.
result: Significant increase in ad Click-Through Rate (CTR)
Video audience retention rate met the target
Ad visual assets fully optimized for various mobile ad platforms
